candidates.title: I/O MAG XL Snow Goggles | Smith Optics
candidates.snippet: Large fit; Available in Low Bridge Fit for faces with a lower nose bridge and/or a wide or high cheekbone shape · Includes two lenses: ChromaPop lens for bright light (installed) and bonus ChromaPop lens for low light conditions · Microfiber goggle bag with replacement lens sleeve

candidates.title: I/O MAG XL | Smith Optics | US
candidates.snippet: We took the Smith MAG interchangeable system and integrated it with a more expansive window to the mountains. The I/O MAG XL's extra-large spherical ChromaPop lens enhances clarity and amplifies your experience.

candidates.title: I/O MAG XL Low Bridge Fit Snow Goggles | Smith Optics
candidates.snippet: Meet the I/O MAG XL snow goggles, available in low bridge fit. We took our best-selling I/O MAG goggles and made them bigger to fit more faces.
